claim: When a European technology company needed to close a EUR 450M cross-border acquisition, they faced opposition from 800 employees at the target, two regulatory jurisdictions, and intense media scrutiny. Duke Strategies orchestrated communications across 8 stakeholder groups and 4 time zones on announcement day. The deal closed on schedule, employee retention hit 92% — well above the 70-75% industry average — and media coverage stayed 75% positive throughout.

Proprietary AI-driven stakeholder intelligence methodology using NLP, network analysis, sentiment scoring, and coalition detection algorithms applied to public data, media, council minutes, and social media
